archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) blended with Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) for Coastal SaaS
vibe_description: Clean, modern, heavily utilizing whitespace. It merges the structural precision and data clarity of Stripe (crisp typography, subtle 1px borders, deep navy tones) with the approachable, photo-first, breathable design of Airbnb (rounded photo cards, generous padding, intuitive workflows). Avoid 2010 enterprise clutter.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. Cards must have p-6 or p-8.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Use Mode B 'Control Room Grid': grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Tight gaps, utilized space.
layout_and_spacing.field_app_mobile: Mobile-first. Use bottom tab navigation or simple top-left hamburger. Single-column layouts, enormous touch targets (min 48px height), prominent English/Spanish toggles.

components.cards: Cardless or completely flat surfaces. 1px solid border (#E5E7EB), minimal to no shadow. For photos inside cards, use rounded-lg corners.
components.buttons: Primary: Solid #0A2540 or #0066FF with text-white, px-6 py-3, subtle hover lift. Storm Mode: Solid #FF5A5F. Large buttons for mobile workflows.
components.tables: Clean, border-collapse, ample row padding (py-4), muted text for metadata, high contrast for primary column (property name, owner).
components.forms: Inputs with flat styling, 1px borders, subtle focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0066FF]). Include clear helper text.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5 or 2, minimal, scale properly with text.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio against backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_ids: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit', data-testid='storm-mode-toggle', data-testid='upload-photo-btn').

vacation_homes_exteriors.description: Modern coastal home exterior, ideal for property listings or owner portal cover.
View of the ocean from a beach house, good for hero sections or unified inbox background.

interiors.description: Modern dining area with ocean view, perfect for 'Guest Ready' thumbnails.

housekeeping_and_maintenance.description: Maintenance worker repairing unit. Use for visual maintenance logs or task avatars.
Housekeeper changing linens. Good for housekeeping dashboards.

storm_mode_events.description: Stormy ocean waves. Use as banner background when 'Storm Mode' is activated.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Stripe meets Airbnb aesthetic: clean layout with 1px borders, ample whitespace, crisp Cabinet Grotesk headings, and soft rounded images.
Implement role-based layouts: The Operations & Owner portals should look like data-dense, highly polished SaaS dashboards (charts, tables, hold calendars, split-ledger trust accounting views).
The Field App (Housekeepers/Maintenance) MUST be heavily mobile-first: simple task feeds, large tap targets, massive 'Upload Photo' buttons for before/after logs, and a clear English/Spanish toggle.
Coastal Maintenance Engine: Build the predictive scheduling views (e.g., 60-day salt-corrosion checks).
Storm Mode Workflow: When activated, shift UI accents to Coral (#FF5A5F) and display high-priority hurricane prep dispatch lists.
Communications Hub: Build a unified inbox thread view consolidating multiple platforms (Airbnb, VRBO) with AI-drafted reply suggestions.
Trust Accounting: Show a split-ledger view separating Owner Payouts, PMC Commission, Cleaning Fees, and Taxes.
Ensure 'data-testid' is attached to all inputs, buttons, and significant UI elements for end-to-end testing.
Do NOT use any placeholder images; rely exclusively on the URLs provided in this file.
